name: FctsIdsPrmRateXfrm

text.value:
WITH cte1 AS (
    SELECT
        PDRT_CK,
        RTRIM(LTRIM(PDRT_WHOS_AGE_IND)) AS PDRT_WHOS_AGE_IND,
        RTRIM(LTRIM(PDRT_TYPE)) AS PDRT_TYPE,
        PDRT_EFF_DT,
        PDRT_TERM_DT,
        RTRIM(LTRIM(PDRT_PFX)) AS PDRT_PFX,
        RTRIM(LTRIM(PDRT_DESC)) AS PDRT_DESC,
        RTRIM(LTRIM(PDRT_MODIFIER)) AS PDRT_MODIFIER,
        PDRT_MAX_CHILD,
        PDRT_BASIS,
        PDRT_KEY_STRUCT,
        RTRIM(LTRIM(PDRT_METH)) AS PDRT_METH,
        RTRIM(LTRIM(PDRT_COL_STRUCT)) AS PDRT_COL_STRUCT,
        RTRIM(LTRIM(PDRT_MOD_TYPE)) AS PDRT_MOD_TYPE,
        PDRT_AGE_FROM,
        PDRT_AGE_THRU
    FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.TMP1_FctsIdsPrmRateXfrm
),
cte2 AS (
    SELECT
        cte1.*,
        CONVERT(CHAR(10), cte1.PDRT_EFF_DT, 23) AS EffDt,
        CONVERT(CHAR(10), cte1.PDRT_TERM_DT, 23) AS TermDt
    FROM cte1
),
cte3 AS (
    SELECT
        (@{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCd} + ';' + CAST(cte2.PDRT_CK AS VARCHAR(10))) AS PRI_NAT_KEY_STRING,
        @{pipeline().parameters.RunIDTimeStamp} AS FIRST_RECYC_TS,
        @{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCd} AS SRC_SYS_CD,
        cte2.PDRT_CK AS PRM_RATE_UNIQ_KEY,
        0 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,
        0 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,
        @{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCdSk} AS SRC_SYS_CD_SK,
        CASE WHEN cte2.PDRT_WHOS_AGE_IND IS NULL OR LEN(RTRIM(LTRIM(cte2.PDRT_WHOS_AGE_IND))) = 0 THEN 'NA' ELSE cte2.PDRT_WHOS_AGE_IND END AS PRM_RATE_AGE_ENTY_CD,
        CASE WHEN cte2.PDRT_TYPE IS NULL OR LEN(RTRIM(LTRIM(cte2.PDRT_TYPE))) = 0 THEN 'NA' ELSE cte2.PDRT_TYPE END AS PRM_RATE_PRM_TYP_CD,
        cte2.EffDt AS EFF_DT,
        cte2.TermDt AS TERM_DT,
        RTRIM(LTRIM(cte2.PDRT_PFX)) AS PRM_RATE_PFX,
        CASE WHEN cte2.PDRT_DESC IS NULL OR LEN(RTRIM(LTRIM(cte2.PDRT_DESC))) = 0 THEN 'NA' ELSE cte2.PDRT_DESC END AS PRM_RATE_DESC,
        RTRIM(LTRIM(cte2.PDRT_MODIFIER)) AS PRM_RATE_MOD_ID,
        CASE WHEN cte2.PDRT_MAX_CHILD IS NULL THEN 99 ELSE cte2.PDRT_MAX_CHILD END AS MAX_CHLDRN_RATED_NO,
        CASE WHEN cte2.PDRT_BASIS IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE cte2.PDRT_BASIS END AS PRM_RATE_BSS_NO,
        CASE WHEN cte2.PDRT_KEY_STRUCT IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE cte2.PDRT_KEY_STRUCT END AS PRM_RATE_KEY_STRCT_NO,
        RTRIM(LTRIM(cte2.PDRT_METH)) AS PRM_RATE_METH,
        RTRIM(LTRIM(cte2.PDRT_COL_STRUCT)) AS PRM_RATE_COL_STRUCT,
        RTRIM(LTRIM(cte2.PDRT_MOD_TYPE)) AS PRM_RATE_MOD_TYPE,
        CASE WHEN cte2.PDRT_AGE_FROM IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE cte2.PDRT_AGE_FROM END AS TIER_AGE_BAND_FROM_NO,
        CASE WHEN cte2.PDRT_AGE_THRU IS NULL THEN 120 ELSE cte2.PDRT_AGE_THRU END AS TIER_AGE_BAND_THRU_NO
    FROM cte2
),
cte4 AS (
    SELECT
        @{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCdSk} AS SRC_SYS_CD_SK,
        cte2.PDRT_CK AS PRM_RATE_UNIQ_KEY
    FROM cte2
)

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.TMP2_FctsIdsPrmRateXfrm
SELECT *
INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.TMP2_FctsIdsPrmRateXfrm
FROM cte3

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.TMP3_FctsIdsPrmRateXfrm
SELECT *
INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.TMP3_FctsIdsPrmRateXfrm
FROM cte4
